aliases: ["infinity loop", "infinity loop colorado", "elbert massive infinity loop", "elbert massive loop", "the infinity loop"]
key_terrain: Figure-eight linking Colorado's two tallest 14ers (Elbert 14,440 + Massive 14,421) from the Elbert/Twin Lakes TH near Buena Vista. ~27-29 mi, ~9,700 ft gain. Typical flow: ascend Massive (East Slopes), descend SW slope, cross the connecting valley, ascend Elbert (SE Ridge), descend (NE Ridge). Both summits are above 14,400 ft with extended high exposure.
aspects: Multiple aspects on both peaks; the connecting valley and north-facing slopes hold snow longest; long sustained time above treeline = afternoon lightning exposure.
distinct_from_standard: This is a 27-29 mile two-peak figure-eight, NOT the standard Elbert or Massive out-and-back. Standard single-peak conditions do not capture the full linkup, the valley crossing, or the cumulative exposure.

key_terrain: Mount Yale ascent, Sawatch 14er. Strava: pain free hiking.
Mount Shavano ascent, Sawatch 14er. Strava: 95% clear (April).
Browns Creek trail, Sawatch. Strava: Little Browns is bone dry.
Sangre de Cristo social series long run, includes Phantom Terrace area.
